name: Herbed Mushroom Quiche Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon mixed spices-herbs (oregano, parsley, garlic salt, and pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs, cottage cheese, flour, baking powder, and seasoned salt.
3. Stir in Swiss cheese, mushrooms, butter, and herbs/spices.
4. Pour mixture into a 13 x 9 x 2 inch glass baking dish.
5. Bake uncovered for 15 minutes at 400 degrees.
6. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and continue baking for 35-40 minutes.
7. Cut into bite-size squares.
8. Serve hot or cold.
